overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing an FBI agent exploring a rustic wooden lodge interior. The character moves through connected rooms including a living area with a stone fireplace, a dining hall, and a private office, interacting with objects and examining the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic lodge living room with stone fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking through the living room area toward a person seated on the couch

notable_agents.action: man sitting on leather couch reading or examining papers

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with dark opening and wooden mantel
brown leather sofa with seated occupant
round wooden table with scattered papers and documents
tall wooden shelving unit against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a cozy, wood-paneled living room of a rustic lodge. A large stone fireplace dominates the center background while a man sits on a leather couch to the right. The character walks forward past a coffee table scattered with papers, exploring the warm, dimly lit space.

scene_state.functional_zone: dining hall with white tablecloths and wooden beams

events.description: passes through wooden sliding doors from living room into the dining area

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway into the dining hall, passing tables and a seated woman

notable_agents.action: woman sitting alone at a table near the window with curtains

entered.detail: round table covered with white tablecloth near the windows
thick wooden support beams throughout the dining area
wooden bar counter with shelving in the background

segments.scene_description: Transitioning through wooden sliding doors, the scene opens into a spacious dining hall with high ceilings and exposed wooden beams. Natural light filters through curtained windows. The character passes a woman seated at a white-tablecloth table on the right, moving toward the bar area visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: central dining area with multiple tables

agents.ego_description: traversing the dining hall toward a man standing near the back

notable_agents.action: man in plaid shirt standing near the bar, raising his hands in a gesture

entered.detail: long wooden bar with stools and back shelving

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the dining hall past multiple empty tables with white tablecloths, the character approaches a man in a plaid shirt standing near the bar area. The man raises his hands in a gesture as the character walks toward the rear of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corridor leading to private office

events.description: exits the dining hall through a rear doorway into a narrow corridor
enters the private office through a door marked Private

agents.ego_description: walking through the back corridor and entering a private room with a brick fireplace

entered.detail: narrow hallway with wooden walls and dim lighting
tall water dispenser with blue bottle
brass sign reading Private on the office door
red brick fireplace with wooden mantel and mounted deer head

segments.scene_description: Leaving the dining area through a rear doorway, the character enters a narrow, dimly lit corridor. Passing a water cooler, the character approaches a door marked with a brass Private sign and enters a small office featuring a distinctive brick fireplace with a mounted deer head.

scene_state.functional_zone: private office with hunting trophy and brick fireplace

events.description: character touches the mounted deer head on the brick wall, causing it to shift and reset position

agents.ego_description: approaching the fireplace, touching the deer head mount, and examining the room

entered.detail: taxidermied deer head with antlers mounted above the fireplace
upholstered green armchair next to the fireplace
small wooden table beside the armchair

segments.scene_description: Inside the private office, the character approaches the brick fireplace and reaches up to touch the mounted deer head. The trophy shifts position when touched before resetting. The room contains an armchair and side table near a window with grid panes, creating an intimate, wood-paneled atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: main lodge area with investigation case board

events.description: exits the private office and returns to the main lodge area

agents.ego_description: walking toward a large case board on the wall displaying an investigation map

entered.detail: large cork board with map and investigation photos pinned to it
topographical map with yellow markers and connecting strings
metal shelving unit with boxes and files

segments.scene_description: Returning to the main lodge area, the character approaches a large case board mounted on the wooden wall. The board displays a topographical investigation map with photos and yellow markers connected by string. File shelves and a desk are visible to the right as the character examines the evidence board.

scene_state.functional_zone: window area with view to outside

agents.ego_description: approaching the large windows and looking out at the exterior view

entered.detail: tall windows with wooden grid frames overlooking the outside
white radiator beneath the windows

segments.scene_description: Moving toward the tall grid-patterned windows, the character looks out at the exterior view showing greenery and parked vehicles outside. Natural daylight streams through the panes, illuminating the radiator and small table beneath the windows as the character observes the outside environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic lodge, transitioning from cozy communal living spaces into a private office before returning to a detailed investigation area. It begins in a dimly lit, wood-paneled living room with a stone fireplace, moving past a man on a leather couch and through sliding doors into a spacious, high-ceilinged dining hall illuminated by natural light. As the camera passes white-tablecloth tables and a man in a plaid shirt near the bar, the scene shifts through a rear doorway into a narrow corridor and then into a private office featuring a brick fireplace and a mounted deer head. The movement then flows back into the main lodge area to examine a large case board covered in maps and string-connected photos, before finally turning toward tall grid-patterned windows that reveal greenery and parked vehicles outside.
